LanguageData.VPE_AdrenalineRush.description: Psychically induces a surge of adrenaline in the caster, blocking all pain and augmenting their sight, hearing and movement. Lasts roughly thirty seconds depending on the userâ€™s psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_AdrenalineRush.label: adrenaline rush
LanguageData.VPE_Age.description: Very inefficiently siphons life force from a living target, de-aging the caster by 2 years and aging the other by 10. Very debilitating aftereffects for the victim and considered a hostile action by allies.
LanguageData.VPE_Age.label: age
LanguageData.VPE_AggressiveHeatDump.description: Instantly dump all of your neural heat into a target, causing them to explode with an area of effect relative to the heat lost and the targetâ€™s psychic sensitivity. A good declaration of war.
LanguageData.VPE_AggressiveHeatDump.label: aggressive heat dump
LanguageData.VPE_AnimalAllies.description: Infuses a large area with harmonic life force that influences animal behavior, causing them to attack those hostile to the caster for a duration scaling with their psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_AnimalAllies.label: animal allies
LanguageData.VPE_Assassinate.description: Links the casterâ€™s shadow to a target in dark areas, allowing them to skip back and forth multiple times to attack in melee. The amount of hits depends on the casterâ€™s psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_Assassinate.label: assassinate
LanguageData.VPE_BallLightning.description: The caster compresses a ball of condensed electricity which will slowly move to a designated location. A few seconds after release, it will start discharging into nearby surrounding targets with living bolts of electricity.
LanguageData.VPE_BallLightning.label: ball lightning
LanguageData.VPE_Beckon.description: Psychically command the target to approach the caster.
LanguageData.VPE_Beckon.label: beckon
LanguageData.VPE_BendProbability.description: Creates a ripple of cosmic scale that will force something to happen.
LanguageData.VPE_BendProbability.label: bend probability
LanguageData.VPE_Berserk.description: Induce a berserker psychosis in the target's mind, causing them to attack anyone nearby. They regain rationality after 15 seconds, depending on their psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_Berserk.label: berserk
LanguageData.VPE_BerserkPulse.description: Generate an overwhelming rush of undirected rage in everyone near the target point. Considered an overt act of aggression and lasts several seconds.
LanguageData.VPE_BerserkPulse.label: berskerk pulse
LanguageData.VPE_BladeFocus.description: Psychically augments the muscle fibers, ligaments and joints in the casterâ€™s arms, doubling their melee attack speed for roughly two minutes depending on their psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_BladeFocus.label: blade focus
LanguageData.VPE_BlindingPulse.description: Induce noise in the visual centers of the brain, obscuring vision of everyone near the target point. Lasts for half a minute, affected by psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_BlindingPulse.label: blinding pulse
LanguageData.VPE_Bliss.description: After a brief meditation period, induce a sense of serenity in the target that reaches maximum magnitude near the effectâ€™s end. As the calming feeling becomes more pronounced, they will find it harder to concentrate but it is not considered a malicious action.
LanguageData.VPE_Bliss.label: bliss
LanguageData.VPE_Blizzard.description: Using differential-pressure skipgates, water-linked skipgates and nodes of psychic entropy, creates a swirling blizzard away from the caster. Those exposed to the tempest experience reduced sight, moving and manipulation, as well as hypothermia buildup and cutting cold. Duration scales with the casterâ€™s psychic sensitivity and puts them in a 5-day coma.
LanguageData.VPE_Blizzard.label: blizzard
LanguageData.VPE_Bolt.description: Hurls a weak bolt of electricity to strike a small target, inflicting minor burns on direct hits and area EMP damage.
LanguageData.VPE_Bolt.label: bolt
LanguageData.VPE_BrambleMaze.description: Infuses a fertile area with chaotic life energy, causing it to sprout shoots of brambles that wither after 12 hours.
LanguageData.VPE_BrambleMaze.label: bramble maze
LanguageData.VPE_BreatheFlame.description: Generates a brief, unidirectional skipgate within underground reservoirs of unrefined organic chemicals, along with a tiny spark in front of the casterâ€™s mouth. Jets of blazing, unrefined chemfuel streak forth setting everything on fire.
LanguageData.VPE_BreatheFlame.label: breathe flame
LanguageData.VPE_Burden.description: Slow the target for a short time by suppressing motor activity in the brain. Considered a hostile action and affected by the targetâ€™s psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_Burden.label: burden
LanguageData.VPE_ChainBolt.description: Projects a living bolt of electricity to a target which can then follow up with 5 more nearby targets, inflicting small burns and EMP damage.
LanguageData.VPE_ChainBolt.label: chain bolt
LanguageData.VPE_ChaosSkip.description: Teleport the target to a random position near where he started. Stuns the target for a second and is considered a hostile action.
LanguageData.VPE_ChaosSkip.label: chaos skip
LanguageData.VPE_Chunkskip.description: Skip the 5 chunks of rock or slag to scatter them near the target point. This is useful for producing cover during offensive operations.
LanguageData.VPE_Chunkskip.label: chunk skip
LanguageData.VPE_ColdZone.description: Cause an area to manifest nodes of psychic entropy for the next 24 hours, drastically lowering the temperature.
LanguageData.VPE_ColdZone.label: cold zone
LanguageData.VPE_ConjureHeatPearls.description: Converts a minimum amount of the casterâ€™s heat into metaphysical pearls. These can be thrown at other psycasters to induce massive amounts of heat on them, but are otherwise harmless.
LanguageData.VPE_ConjureHeatPearls.label: conjure heat pearls
LanguageData.VPE_ConsumeBodies.description: Psychically strips all remaining life force from nearby humanoid corpses and stores the essence as a permanent stacking buffer to neural heat.
LanguageData.VPE_ConsumeBodies.label: consume bodies
LanguageData.VPE_ControlledFrenzy.description: Psychically augments the casterâ€™s prowess and killing urges, doubling their damage output with all weapons. Each kill reduces the casterâ€™s heat by 10 and resets the duration of the frenzy.
LanguageData.VPE_ControlledFrenzy.label: controlled frenzy
LanguageData.VPE_Corpsetalk.description: Target a corpse and temporarily appropriate the victimâ€™s skills to make up for the casterâ€™s deficiencies. Effect lasts for a season before returning to normal.
LanguageData.VPE_Corpsetalk.label: corpsetalk
LanguageData.VPE_CraftPsyRing.description: Psychically alters the form of a piece of eltex into the shape of a ring, which is imbued with psycasting knowledge of the caster. When worn by another psycaster, this temporarily allows them to use this knowledge to perform the stored psycast without practice.
LanguageData.VPE_CraftPsyRing.label: craft psyring
LanguageData.VPE_CraftTimeskip.description: Using very precise timeskipping, moves the desired item to its finished state as if the creator had continued working on it. Ages the caster by 3 years.
LanguageData.VPE_CraftTimeskip.label: craft timeskip
LanguageData.VPE_CropBurst.description: Infuses a fertile area with life energy, causing it to sprout plantable crops that finish growth in relation to the casterâ€™s psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_CropBurst.label: crop burst
LanguageData.VPE_Darkness.description: Select a target area to generate an orb of completely obfuscating darkness, the duration scaling with the casterâ€™s psychic sensitivity. All vision is blocked and any attacks within or passing through will miss entirely.
LanguageData.VPE_Darkness.label: darkness
LanguageData.VPE_Darkvision.description: Gives the targeted pawn a nictitating membrane that allows them to see equally well in darkness and daytime. Duration scales with the target's psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_Darkvision.label: darkvision
LanguageData.VPE_Deathshield.description: Locks the touched targetâ€™s life force in place for a day, preventing them from dying. After this period, they can die from accumulated wounds, blood loss, or missing limbs or organs.
LanguageData.VPE_Deathshield.label: deathshield
LanguageData.VPE_Decoy.description: Creates a localized field of optical disharmony to travel and remain in a desired location, with a duration scaling with psychic sensitivity. The illusion will draw the ire of all enemies.
LanguageData.VPE_Decoy.label: decoy
LanguageData.VPE_DrainPsyessence.description: Targeting a downed psychically-talented pawn, induces intense harmonic psychic noise to liquify their flesh and convert it into psyessence to be absorbed by the caster as their own accumulated psychic talent. The final moments of psychic disintegration will be felt by everyone for many kilometers around, causing diplomatic consequences with all factions.
LanguageData.VPE_DrainPsyessence.label: drain psyessence
LanguageData.VPE_Eclipse.description: By strategically placing an orb of obfuscating darkness high in the sky, the caster can effectively cause a spontaneous eclipse.
LanguageData.VPE_Eclipse.label: eclipse
LanguageData.VPE_EnchantQuality.description: The caster concentrates on an item and attempts to improve its quality by reshaping the material slightly, but cannot imitate a masterâ€™s handiwork.
LanguageData.VPE_EnchantQuality.label: enchant quality
LanguageData.VPE_EnergyDump.description: Purges the build-up of fatigue in a nearby target and leaves them completely refreshed, in exchange the caster is left completely exhausted and needing a good nap.
LanguageData.VPE_EnergyDump.label: energy dump
LanguageData.VPE_Enthrall.description: Psychically strips the deceased targetâ€™s life force and infuses it directly into their bones, animating them for a full day. The only remaining instinct is to inflict pain on the casterâ€™s enemies.
LanguageData.VPE_Enthrall.label: enthrall
LanguageData.VPE_EssenceTransfer.description: Infuses the life force of another nearby person into a colony animal, linking them and putting the caster in a 6 hour coma. Should the linked person die, the linked animal will go to their side and transfer their own harmonized life essence to them, dying when finished. Should the linked animal die first, the effect is lost and there can only be one link at a time.
LanguageData.VPE_EssenceTransfer.label: essence transfer
LanguageData.VPE_Explosion.description: Generates a brief, micro skipgate within underground reservoirs of unrefined organic chemicals, along with a tiny spark at the designated location. Burning gas bursts forth in a large radius and elements of chemfuel spurt out uncontrollably.
LanguageData.VPE_Explosion.label: explosion
LanguageData.VPE_EyeBlast.description: Generates two micro, unidirectional skipgates in front of the casterâ€™s eyes which link to a nearby white dwarf. Targeting a location to prevent overshooting, the blinding energy shoots forth and sets a small area ablaze.
LanguageData.VPE_EyeBlast.label: eye blast
LanguageData.VPE_Farskip.description: Skip the caster, along with anyone standing near them, to a willing ally at a distant location. This can send people far across the planet, and the skipped people will always appear near a random ally on the target map and be stunned for a few seconds from the journey.
LanguageData.VPE_Farskip.label: farskip
LanguageData.VPE_FireBeam.description: Attempts to recreate the power of a star inside a concentrated column of almost liquidized oxygen. The resulting emission of plasma is so powerful that only the most advanced weapons systems can hope to compare. The long, intense concentration ends with the caster falling into a 6-hour coma.
LanguageData.VPE_FireBeam.label: fire beam
LanguageData.VPE_FireShield.description: Creates a temporary incendiary vortex skipgate around a target that links to a nearby star that extends outward by a few inches. Anyone that attempts to attack the target in melee will be set ablaze, with the additional benefit of overpowering any other fire effects.
LanguageData.VPE_FireShield.label: fire shield
LanguageData.VPE_FiringFocus.description: Psychically augments the hands, eyes and reaction speed of the caster, reducing their ranged attack cooldown by 80% for roughly two minutes depending on their psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_FiringFocus.label: firing focus
LanguageData.VPE_Flameball.description: Generate a small fragile pod of magma as the caster lobs the projectile away. Upon impact, the liquid bursts forth in a small radius.
LanguageData.VPE_Flameball.label: flameball
LanguageData.VPE_FlameTornado.description: Attempts to recreate the power of a star inside a vortex of concentrated oxygen. The mess of reactions occurring creates flammable byproducts in its wake while also leaving its trajectory completely unpredictable.
LanguageData.VPE_FlameTornado.label: fire tornado
LanguageData.VPE_Flashstorm.description: Use concentrated differential-pressure skipgates in the atmosphere to generate a localized flashstorm. The storm will strike the area with lightning for some time before dissipating.
LanguageData.VPE_Flashstorm.label: flashstorm
LanguageData.VPE_Focus.description: Psychically focus the target's mind for a minute, boosting their sight, hearing and moving capacities.
LanguageData.VPE_Focus.label: focus
LanguageData.VPE_FrostRay.description: Push forth a concentrated stream of psychic entropy for a few seconds, rapidly inducing cuts and hypothermia. The duration scales with the casterâ€™s psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_FrostRay.label: frost ray
LanguageData.VPE_Ghostwalk.description: Psychically convinces the atoms of the caster that they are able to pass between the atoms of structures. The duration of the deceit scales with the casterâ€™s psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_Ghostwalk.label: ghostwalk
LanguageData.VPE_GroupLink.description: Creates a sphere of psychic suggestion around the caster, linking all pawns within to the caster and allowing any single target â€œWord ofâ€ psycast to affect all others. The effect ends when those linked move out of range.
LanguageData.VPE_GroupLink.label: group link
LanguageData.VPE_GuardianSkipbarrier.description: Generate a spherical skipgate around the caster that sends all incoming ground-level projectiles to some distant place, lasting as long as they can manage the heat accumulation. People and items are not affected. It takes immense concentration to hold, as such the caster needs to be mindful of their steps.
LanguageData.VPE_GuardianSkipbarrier.label: guardian skipbarrier
LanguageData.VPE_GuidedShot.description: Projects a psychic aura for 8 seconds that allows the caster to alter the path of any bullet they fire, effectively doubling their weapon range and guaranteeing hits for the duration.
LanguageData.VPE_GuidedShot.label: guided shot
LanguageData.VPE_Haywire.description: Designates an area to experience psychic interference, effectively scrambling electronic systemsâ€™ IFFs while identifying the casterâ€™s people as allies. Duration scales with psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_Haywire.label: haywire
LanguageData.VPE_HealthSwap.description: Creates an imbalance between the life forces of two people, causing all negative health conditions to flow from one to the other. Conditions that canâ€™t be transferred are healed.
LanguageData.VPE_HealthSwap.label: health swap
LanguageData.VPE_HeatFocus.description: Initiates harmonic meditation which converts all accumulated heat in psyfocus after 10 seconds.
LanguageData.VPE_HeatFocus.label: heat focus
LanguageData.VPE_Hurricane.description: The caster forcibly changes the weather - using widespread differential-pressure skipgates - to a downpour with hurricane-force winds, which lasts as long as the caster can manage the heat accumulation and can instantly stop at-will. Those outdoors will experience progressively severe limitations to sight, moving and manipulation to the point they come to a complete stop.
LanguageData.VPE_Hurricane.label: hurricane
LanguageData.VPE_IceBlock.description: Combining nodes of psychic entropy and a skipgate linked to an ocean, creating a large block of ice to form in the target location. Fragile and can melt if the temperature is above freezing.
LanguageData.VPE_IceBlock.label: ice block
LanguageData.VPE_IceBreath.description: Breathe forward a stream of psychic entropy, the resulting cold cutting and inducing hypothermia scaling with the distance to the target.
LanguageData.VPE_IceBreath.label: breathe ice
LanguageData.VPE_IceCrystal.description: Creates a node of psychic entropy in the form of a crystal, sapping the heat from the room for the next 5 days.
LanguageData.VPE_IceCrystal.label: ice crystal
LanguageData.VPE_IceShield.description: Creates an aura of psychic entropy around the target for several seconds, preventing them from experiencing cold and inducing hypothermia on any who try to attack them in melee.
LanguageData.VPE_IceShield.label: ice shield
LanguageData.VPE_IceSpike.description: Condenses vapor with psychic entropy into an icicle launched at a target, the damage scaling with psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_IceSpike.label: ice spike
LanguageData.VPE_IceWall.description: Combining nodes of psychic entropy and miniature skipgates linked to an ocean, creating a circular wall of ice to form around the caster. Fragile and can melt if the temperature is above freezing.
LanguageData.VPE_IceWall.label: ice wall
LanguageData.VPE_IntensifyShadows.description: Links the casterâ€™s shadow with the shade and infuses it with obfuscating darkness, plummeting all areas on the map with less than 50% light levels into pitch darkness. Duration scales with the casterâ€™s psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_IntensifyShadows.label: intensify shadows
LanguageData.VPE_Invisibility.description: Psychically manipulate the visual centers of everyone nearby, rendering them unable to perceive a particular individual for a short time.
LanguageData.VPE_Invisibility.label: invisibility
LanguageData.VPE_Killskip.description: Teleports to the target and executes a melee strike, weakened or augmented by the casterâ€™s melee skill. If the target is killed, teleports to the next closest enemy at no cost and attacks again, until there is nothing left to kill.
LanguageData.VPE_Killskip.label: killskip
LanguageData.VPE_Liferot.description: Psychically induces randomized mass necrosis in a target, exposing the afflicted body parts to infection and intense gagging due to the smell. Duration scales with the targetâ€™s psychic sensitivity and is an obviously overtly hostile action.
LanguageData.VPE_Liferot.label: liferot
LanguageData.VPE_LocationSwap.description: Spawns two precise, single-use skipgates between the caster and the visible target, allowing them to trade places.
LanguageData.VPE_LocationSwap.label: location swap
LanguageData.VPE_LuckTransfer.description: Creates a rift in karmic balance by shifting the negative karma from the first target onto the second target, as well as receiving their positive karma. Only affects combat and the duration scales with the first targetâ€™s psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_LuckTransfer.label: luck transfer
LanguageData.VPE_ManhunterPulse.description: Drive animals in a large area into a manhunting rage using a psychic pulse, lasting a minute. Considered a declaration of war if it affects the animals in a caravan.
LanguageData.VPE_ManhunterPulse.label: manhunter pulse
LanguageData.VPE_MassBeckon.description: Psychically command the targets within an area to approach the caster.
LanguageData.VPE_MassBeckon.label: mass beckon
LanguageData.VPE_MassChaosSkip.description: Skip everyone near a target point to a random location nearby. Considered a nuisance as it can put allies in danger.
LanguageData.VPE_MassChaosSkip.label: mass chaos skip
LanguageData.VPE_MassHallucination.description: Creating a massive burst of psychic suggestion, convinced nearby pawns that rooms are the absolute best they could possibly be. The resulting coma for the caster and the effect lasts for five days.
LanguageData.VPE_MassHallucination.label: mass hallucination
LanguageData.VPE_Mend.description: The caster concentrates on an item and attempts to repair present damage by rebinding the material, with the effect scaling with their psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_Mend.label: mend
LanguageData.VPE_MeteorShower.description: Introduces gravitational distortions in orbiting meteoroids and space debris to strike a location of the casterâ€™s choosing. These come in groups of 4 to ensure optimal control and devastation.
LanguageData.VPE_MeteorShower.label: meteor shower
LanguageData.VPE_MindBreak.description: Using concentrated harmonic psychic noise, lobotomizes the target and turns them into a serving, restless thrall. Very much unappreciated by their former factions.
LanguageData.VPE_MindBreak.label: mind break
LanguageData.VPE_Mindcontrol.description: Psychically dominate a target for a brief period, scaling with their psychic sensitivity, giving the caster a second body. However, itâ€™s difficult being two people at once.
LanguageData.VPE_Mindcontrol.label: mind control
LanguageData.VPE_MindWipe.description: Induce a harmless, instantaneous retrograde amnesia in the target, purging all memories, social bonds and skills acquired outside of their backstory. They also feel a strong kinship with the casterâ€™s colony and joy at rediscovering the joys of life without commitment.
LanguageData.VPE_MindWipe.label: mind wipe
LanguageData.VPE_NeuralHeatDetonation.description: Efficiently but indiscriminately dumps all of the casterâ€™s neural heat into an explosion away from themselves, the size being both relative to the heat lost and their psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_NeuralHeatDetonation.label: neural heat detonation
LanguageData.VPE_NeuralHeatDump.description: Instantly dump all your neural heat into a conscious ally. As a side effect, the target will fall into a debilitating, harmless coma for about a day. The target must actively accept the psychic invasion, so only conscious allies can be targeted.
LanguageData.VPE_NeuralHeatDump.label: neural heat dump
LanguageData.VPE_Neuroquake.description: Find a discontinuity in the psychic field and unfold it, releasing a massive amount of psychic energy. Every creature in range but outside of the safe inner circle will be driven violently insane. Casting this takes 12 seconds of meditation, and afterwards, the caster will go into a five-day psychic coma. The disturbing neuroquake echoes will inflict pain on everyone for many kilometers around, causing diplomatic consequences with all factions.
LanguageData.VPE_Neuroquake.label: neuroquake
LanguageData.VPE_Nightstep.description: Briefly links nearby allies to a distant colonistâ€™s shadow to instantly teleport them, even across the planet as long as they are not overburdened. Can only be cast at night and temporarily stuns the caster.
LanguageData.VPE_Nightstep.label: nightstep
LanguageData.VPE_Obscure.description: Creates a field of optical disharmony around the caster, causing affected allies standing in darkness to be completely invisible. Attacking breaks the illusion.
LanguageData.VPE_Obscure.label: obscure
LanguageData.VPE_Overshield.description: Generate a spherical skipgate on a target that sends all incoming ground-level projectiles to some distant place, the duration scaling with the targetâ€™s psychic sensitivity. People and items are not affected.
LanguageData.VPE_Overshield.label: overshield
LanguageData.VPE_Painblock.description: Severely limit pain pathways in the target's brain for a couple of minutes. This can allow a person to move and act even with grievous injuries which would normally incapacitate them.
LanguageData.VPE_Painblock.label: painblock
LanguageData.VPE_ParalysisPulse.description: Emits a cloud of black particles around the caster, which afflicts all those within the area - except the caster - with 2 hours of paralytic abasia. The radius scales with the casterâ€™s psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_ParalysisPulse.label: paralysis pulse
LanguageData.VPE_PlantTimeskip.description: Grows all the plants in a radius around the caster to maturity.
LanguageData.VPE_PlantTimeskip.label: plant timeskip
LanguageData.VPE_Power.description: Metaphysically alters the designated equipmentâ€™s power input to extract energy directly from fluctuations in the quantum foam for a few days. Duration scales with psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_Power.label: power
LanguageData.VPE_PowerLeap.description: Drastically augments the casterâ€™s legs, feet and spine to be able to leap great distances and land without injury, the distance improving with the userâ€™s psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_PowerLeap.label: power leap
LanguageData.VPE_PsychicDrone.description: Creates a massive psychic drone aura around the caster tuned to hostiles, frequently driving them insane until they overcome the break. Duration scales with the casterâ€™s psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_PsychicDrone.label: psychic drone
LanguageData.VPE_PsychicGuidance.description: Dampens the casterâ€™s sight, hearing, movement and manipulation in exchange for overcharging the targetâ€™s own physical abilities.
LanguageData.VPE_PsychicGuidance.label: psychic guidance
LanguageData.VPE_PsychicShock.description: Psychically shocks the target's mind with chaotic images, blocking coherent perception and dropping them into a state of psychic shock. There is a risk of brain damage and is overtly hostile.
LanguageData.VPE_PsychicShock.label: psychic shock
LanguageData.VPE_QuenchFlames.description: Generates skipgates linked to passing nearby ships that â€œmisplacesâ€ the firefoam contained in the shipâ€™s fire suppression system. As there is a lot to â€œborrowâ€, the radius is quite impressive.
LanguageData.VPE_QuenchFlames.label: extinguish flames
LanguageData.VPE_RaidPause.description: Depending on the casterâ€™s psychic sensitivity, slows all raiders on the map to a complete stop for up to five minutes. Attacking any single affected raider jolts all of them back into action.
LanguageData.VPE_RaidPause.label: raid pause
LanguageData.VPE_Recharge.description: Carefully and delicately tunes a stream of electricity to a touched battery to charge it with 100kW or the equivalent of 100 Wd/s. The duration of charge depends on the casterâ€™s psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_Recharge.label: recharge
LanguageData.VPE_RegrowLimbs.description: Induces a complex form of psychic rejuvenation that targets the subjectâ€™s limbs, namely those that are missing. The effect is gradual over a full dayâ€™s time and often described as â€œwildly uncomfortableâ€ as it overstimulates their phantom limb syndrome.
LanguageData.VPE_RegrowLimbs.label: regrow limbs
LanguageData.VPE_Resurrect.description: By sacrificing a natural finger, the caster is able to imitate the effects of resurrector mech serum on any non-dessicated corpse, the psychic energy repairing broken-down tissues and kickstarting the body back to life. The target will be incapacitated and their allegiances will remain the same. The less preserved the body is, the more likely the target is to suffer from negative side effects. The long, intense concentration ends with the caster falling into a 6-hour coma.
LanguageData.VPE_Resurrect.label: resurrect
LanguageData.VPE_ReunionFarskip.description: After a short meditation period and followed by a 5-day coma, taps into a targetâ€™s bloodline to skip all living family members to their proximity, knocked out through psychic shock. However, it does nothing to change their relationships and is considered rude by all other factions.
LanguageData.VPE_ReunionFarskip.label: reunion farskip
LanguageData.VPE_ReverseEngineer.description: The caster concentrates on an object and attempts to unravel the knowledge needed to manufacture more of them. The long, intense concentration ends with the caster falling into a 12-hour coma.
LanguageData.VPE_ReverseEngineer.label: reverse engineer
LanguageData.VPE_RockConstruct.description: Converts a minimum amount of the casterâ€™s heat capacity into metaphysical crystals to be implanted into a stone chunk. This new rock construct is capable of performing simple chores, and breaking the crystal allows the heat capacity to be restored.
LanguageData.VPE_RockConstruct.label: rock construct
LanguageData.VPE_SeasonTimeskip.description: Locks the entire planet into a season-long psychically induced slowdown, effectively skipping forward a season. Nigh instantaneous effect, very strenuous and puts the caster in a coma.
LanguageData.VPE_SeasonTimeskip.label: season timeskip
LanguageData.VPE_SelfExplosion.description: Creates a brief-lived incendiary vortex skipgate around the caster that is connected to hidden reservoirs of pressurized flammable gas. As the gas escapes, it ignites and spreads rapidly, dealing little direct damage but will set almost everything it touches on fire.
LanguageData.VPE_SelfExplosion.label: self explosion
LanguageData.VPE_ShadowFocus.description: Emitting particles of absorptive darkness allows the caster to augment their psychic sensitivity, which scales inversely with the local light level.
LanguageData.VPE_ShadowFocus.label: shadowfocus
LanguageData.VPE_Shadowskip.description: Linking the caster with their own shadow allows them to teleport themselves to an area of darkness, even if they canâ€™t see the location.
LanguageData.VPE_Shadowskip.label: shadowskip
LanguageData.VPE_ShieldAnimals.description: Generates spherical skipgates on all colony animals in range that sends all incoming and outgoing ground-level projectiles to some distant place. People and items are not affected and the duration scales with the casterâ€™s psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_ShieldAnimals.label: shield animals
LanguageData.VPE_Shrineshield.description: Generate a spherical skipgate on a nature shrine that sends all incoming and outgoing ground-level projectiles to some distant place. People and items are not affected and the size of the sphere depends on the size of the shrine.
LanguageData.VPE_Shrineshield.label: shrineshield
LanguageData.VPE_SkillRoll.description: Initiates a shift in the targetâ€™s knowledge and accumulated skills, attempting to rebalance them somewhat chaotically with some beneficial guidance. The strain puts the caster in a coma for a day, but can be reduced with psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_SkillRoll.label: skillroll
LanguageData.VPE_Skip.description: Teleport the target to a desired position not too far from his starting point. This is considered a hostile action.
LanguageData.VPE_Skip.label: skip
LanguageData.VPE_Skipdoor.description: Creates an opening to a network of skipgates which can be placed in any location with a permanent presence. The network is tied to a groupâ€™s collective consciousness, allowing others to use it and different psycasters can add to it. However, the entry points are sensitive to physical disturbances which can cause them to collapse.
LanguageData.VPE_Skipdoor.label: skipdoor
LanguageData.VPE_Skipshield.description: Generate a spherical skipgate that sends all incoming and outgoing ground-level projectiles to some distant place. People and items are not affected.
LanguageData.VPE_Skipshield.label: skipshield
LanguageData.VPE_Smokepop.description: Skip dust particles up from under the ground surface to form a thick cloud. This reduces the accuracy of any shot fired through it, and prevents turrets from locking on entirely.
LanguageData.VPE_Smokepop.label: smokepop
LanguageData.VPE_SnapFreeze.description: Creates motes of psychic entropy and miniature skipgates to water reservoirs above all the targets in a small area, encasing them in ice. Victims will experience hypothermia but the ice can melt prematurely if the temperature is above freezing.
LanguageData.VPE_SnapFreeze.label: snap freeze
LanguageData.VPE_SolarPinhole.description: Generate a microscopic skipgate linked to the core of a nearby star for a few days. Solar material leaks through the pinprick in spacetime, illuminating and warming the surrounding area until it closes. The light is enough to work by, but not enough to grow plants.
LanguageData.VPE_SolarPinhole.label: solar pinhole
LanguageData.VPE_SootheFemale.description: Sends out a signal to a distant engine of happiness to begin projecting a positive psychic drone, while also manipulating an orbital amplifier that only affects females.
LanguageData.VPE_SootheFemale.label: psychic sooth (female)
LanguageData.VPE_SootheMale.description: Sends out a signal to a distant engine of happiness to begin projecting a positive psychic drone, while also manipulating an orbital amplifier that only affects males.
LanguageData.VPE_SootheMale.label: psychic sooth (male)
LanguageData.VPE_SpeedBoost.description: Psychically augments the muscle fibers, ligaments and joints in the casterâ€™s legs, tripling their movement speed for roughly two minutes depending on their psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_SpeedBoost.label: speedboost
LanguageData.VPE_Stabilize.description: Temporarily puts the targetâ€™s cardiovascular system in stasis, which prevents them from bleeding out for two minutes.
LanguageData.VPE_Stabilize.label: stabilize
LanguageData.VPE_StaticAura.description: The caster designates a nearby target to receive an aura of surging electricity, which will inflict EMP effects on anything foreign that they approach, including structures, pawns and electrical objects.
LanguageData.VPE_StaticAura.label: static aura
LanguageData.VPE_StaticPulse.description: The caster dumps a massive amount of voltage into the surrounding air, causing an EMP blast in a huge radius which is otherwise harmless.
LanguageData.VPE_StaticPulse.label: static pulse
LanguageData.VPE_StealVitality.description: Siphons vitality from a close, living target, transferring the targetâ€™s natural healing factor, movement speed and consciousness to the caster. Considered an overtly hostile action.
LanguageData.VPE_StealVitality.label: steal vitality
LanguageData.VPE_SteelConstruct.description: Converts a minimum amount of the casterâ€™s heat capacity into metaphysical crystals to be implanted into a steel slag. This new steel construct will follow the caster and defend them from harm, and breaking the crystal allows the heat capacity to be restored.
LanguageData.VPE_SteelConstruct.label: steel construct
LanguageData.VPE_Stun.description: Momentarily disrupts motor function in the target's brain, preventing any movement. This lasts for a few seconds and is considered a hostile action.
LanguageData.VPE_Stun.label: stun
LanguageData.VPE_SummonPack.description: Sends out a pulse of lifeforce into the region, inducing territorial manhunting aggression into numerous animals that will appear to defend the colony. Once all invaders are defeated, the animals will return to their homes. The distance the pulse travels, and with that the relative strength of the creatures are influenced by the casterâ€™s psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_SummonPack.label: summon pack
LanguageData.VPE_Thunderbolt.description: Summons a bolt of lightning to strike a target, inflicting burns on direct hits and a larger area EMP damage.
LanguageData.VPE_Thunderbolt.label: thunderbolt
LanguageData.VPE_Timequake.description: Find a discontinuity in the psychic field and compress it, releasing a massive temporal disturbance. Every creature in range but outside of the safe inner circle will experience rapid aging and structures will warp. Casting this takes 20 seconds of meditation, and afterwards, the caster will go into a five-day psychic coma. The disturbing timequake echoes will inflict pain on everyone for many kilometers around, causing diplomatic consequences with all factions.
LanguageData.VPE_Timequake.label: timequake
LanguageData.VPE_TimeReversal.description: Inefficiently siphons life force to a living target, aging the caster by 5 years and de-aging the other by 10. Has a minimum age, removes age related penalties and puts the caster in a coma.
LanguageData.VPE_TimeReversal.label: time reversal
LanguageData.VPE_TimeskipMeditation.description: Puts the caster's body under significant stress, biologically aging them five years as they earn a considerable amount of experience toward their next Psycast level and regain full Psyfocus.
LanguageData.VPE_TimeskipMeditation.label: timeskip meditation
LanguageData.VPE_TimeSphere.description: Psychically compresses the flow of time in an area. Rapidly ages living creatures, plants flourish and wither, and structures start to disintegrate from the bizarre stress.
LanguageData.VPE_TimeSphere.label: time sphere
LanguageData.VPE_Transmutation.description: Utilizing the alchemical foundation of equivalent exchange, converts a targeted item or stack of items into an object of equal or lesser value. Otherwise extremely unpredictable and uncontrollable.
LanguageData.VPE_Transmutation.label: transmutation
LanguageData.VPE_TransmuteStone.description: Designates an area of stone which will have its minerals swapped out for a single, randomized type from an underground strata.
LanguageData.VPE_TransmuteStone.label: transmute stone
LanguageData.VPE_TreeSprout.description: Infuses a large, fertile area with potent life energy, causing it to sprout fully grown oak trees.
LanguageData.VPE_TreeSprout.label: tree sprout
LanguageData.VPE_Vortex.description: Manifests a gaping vortex of high-voltage electricity - redirected via skipgate from a nebula storm - at a target area with a large effect. Severely hampers movement and manipulating proportionately, with the strongest effect at the center.
LanguageData.VPE_Vortex.label: vortex
LanguageData.VPE_Wallraise.description: Form a temporary wall by skipping rubble and soil up from deep under the ground. Decent range and useful in blocking line of sight and movement for a few hours.
LanguageData.VPE_Wallraise.label: wall raise
LanguageData.VPE_Waterskip.description: Douse a target in water, extinguishing fires. The water is archotechnologically skipped from distant bodies of water or underground aquifers.
LanguageData.VPE_Waterskip.label: waterskip
LanguageData.VPE_WordofAlliance.description: Speak words of friendship and benefits to a close target using psychic suggestion, helping them realize that youâ€™re not all that bad. Only works on those willing to listen and effect scales with the caster's psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_WordofAlliance.label: word of alliance
LanguageData.VPE_WordofAnimals.description: Soothe an animal using psychic suggestion, either calming a manhunting animal or taming them.
LanguageData.VPE_WordofAnimals.label: word of animals
LanguageData.VPE_WordofFear.description: Induces panic by overloading their flight response system for a short duration. Considered a hostile action.
LanguageData.VPE_WordofFear.label: word of fear
LanguageData.VPE_WordofForetelling.description: Psychic whispers of things to come. Colony pawns are inspired, neutrals or friendlies improve relations, prisoners lose their resistance and enemies retreat from their doom.
LanguageData.VPE_WordofForetelling.label: word of foretelling
LanguageData.VPE_WordofHealing.description: Psychically stimulates a personâ€™s regenerative capabilities into overdrive, effectively tripling their natural healing factor for a few days.
LanguageData.VPE_WordofHealing.label: word of healing
LanguageData.VPE_WordofImmunity.description: Psychically stimulates a personâ€™s immune system into overdrive, effectively tripling their immunity gain speed for a few days.
LanguageData.VPE_WordofImmunity.label: word of immunity
LanguageData.VPE_WordofInspiration.description: Speak words encouraging creativity while psychically hypercharging the target's mind with new ideas. The target will experience a random inspiration appropriate to them.
LanguageData.VPE_WordofInspiration.label: word of inspiration
LanguageData.VPE_WordofJoy.description: Speak happy, calming words to someone while using psychic suggestion to implant a joyfuzz loop in his mind. The joyfuzz will suppress uncomfortable thoughts and sensations in the target to improve mood. This has the side-effect of dulling sensation and decision-making, which reduces consciousness.
LanguageData.VPE_WordofJoy.label: word of joy
LanguageData.VPE_WordofLove.description: Speak about someone's romantic virtues while using psychic suggestion to implant romantic desire in the listener. For days afterward, the listener will feel psychically-induced romantic attraction towards the other person. This greatly increases opinion and makes them much more likely to attempt romantic advances and marriage proposals if they get the chance. This power can be used to connect two other people, induce love for the caster, or force oneself to love another.
LanguageData.VPE_WordofLove.label: word of love
LanguageData.VPE_WordofPain.description: Induces noise in the targetâ€™s pain centers of the brain and overstimulates their nerve endings, scaling with their psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_WordofPain.label: word of pain
LanguageData.VPE_WordofProductivity.description: Using words of motivation with a heaping boost to metabolism, makes the touched target a more productive member of society for the next few days. Considered a hostile action and duration is affected by the targetâ€™s psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_WordofProductivity.label: word of productivity
LanguageData.VPE_WordofProgress.description: Speak words encouraging problem solving capabilities while psychically hypercharging the targetâ€™s mind with keen insight. The target will experience double research speed and intellectual skill gain for 5 days, scaling with their psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_WordofProgress.label: word of progress
LanguageData.VPE_WordofProtection.description: Using harmonic psychic noise, physically alters the targetâ€™s body to be more durable and resistant to damage. Lasts a long time and scales with the casterâ€™s psychic sensitivity.
LanguageData.VPE_WordofProtection.label: word of protection
LanguageData.VPE_WordofSerenity.description: Use calming words and psychic suggestion to end a mental break on a person or animal. The target will fall into a short psychic sleep. The psyfocus cost depends on the intensity of the target's mental break.
LanguageData.VPE_WordofSerenity.label: word of serenity
LanguageData.VPE_WordofTrust.description: Speak to the prisoner while using psychic suggestion to reduce his resistance to recruitment. This psycast can only reduce a prisoner's resistance, but cannot recruit him.
LanguageData.VPE_WordofTrust.label: word of trust
